title: tiger's wildlife
description: Adds various new animal species to Vanilla Minecraft!
body:
![the logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53e82cd1324547e862107f11aeaca63e9c407497_0.webp)
This mod introduces a variety of new animals into your Minecraft world, turning every journey into a thrilling encounter with nature's wilderness.

All the animals have been carefully designed to blend into the Vanilla theme of Minecraft.

 

Currently, the mod has over 40 animals which include:

- Tiger (Bengal, Siberian and Sumatran)
- Lion (African)
- Cheetah (African)
- Snow leopard
- Zebra (plains and grevy's)
- Giraffe (rediculated)
- Gazelle (Thomson's)
- Elephant (African and Asian)
- Ostrich
- Deer (red and axis)
- Moose (Eurasian)
- Brown bear (Eurasian)
- Raccoon
- Wild boar (Eurasian)
- Shark
- Crocodile
- Red panda
- Fennec fox
- Capybara
- Bison (American)
- Hyena (spotted)
- Kangaroo (red)
- Koala
- Penguin
- Pigeon
- Rhino (black and indian)
- Okapi
- Saola
- Pangolin
- Chimpanzee
- Addax
- Oryx (Scimitar)
- Gorilla (westen lowland)
- Orangutan (Sumatran)
- Bongo Antelope
- Tamaraw
- Leopard (Indian, arabian, African and Amur)
- African wild dog
- Dhole
- Vaquita
- gaur
- maned wolf
- common hippopatmus
- blue whale

  ITEMS :

- deer antler
- moose antler
- tusks
- banana
- vension
- zebra leather
- big cat claws

  tree :

- banana aka mussa tree (not acurate)

  blocks :

- musa log
- musa planks
- musa wood
- musa striped log
- musa striped wood
- musa fence
- musa barrier
- musa leaves

plants :

- musa sapling
 ...and much to come in future updates.

 

The future updates will not just bring more animals, but also new Trees, Blocks, Biomes, and Structures.

 

Warning : There is a problem whit the animals sounds that are extremlyy loud so i recomed to lower the volume by 50% or lower. Thx for playing whit the mod  -the tiger studio team-

℗ Team AAMC
